message:
Merge PR #2023: fix(deacon): correct commands and add heartbeat to patrol formula

Bug fix: adds heartbeat refresh steps (start + mid-cycle) to deacon patrol to
prevent daemon from killing healthy deacons during long patrol cycles. Also fixes
command typo (bd mol ready → bd ready) and adds gt dogs list.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2023
Author: olpie101 (Eduardo Koloma Jr)

files.patch:
@@ -42,9 +42,27 @@ version = 12
 description = "Type of wisp created for this molecule"
 default = "patrol"
 
+[[steps]]
+id = "heartbeat"
+title = "Refresh heartbeat"
+description = """
+Signal liveness to the daemon.
+
+The daemon monitors `deacon/heartbeat.json` and kills the Deacon if it goes stale
+(>15 minutes without update). Refresh the heartbeat at the start of every patrol cycle
+so the daemon knows we are alive.
+
+```bash
+gt deacon heartbeat "starting patrol cycle"
+```
+
+This MUST run before any other step. Skipping it risks the daemon killing a healthy
+Deacon mid-cycle."""
+
 [[steps]]
 id = "inbox-check"
 title = "Handle callbacks from agents"
+needs = ["heartbeat"]
 description = """
 First, clean up wisps from previous cycles (closed wisps + abandoned wisps):
 ```bash
@@ -313,7 +331,7 @@ The molecule state IS the waiter - patrol discovers reality each cycle.
 
 **Step 1: Find gate-ready molecules**
 ```bash
-bd mol ready --gated --json
+bd ready --gated --json
 ```
 
 This returns molecules where:
@@ -452,10 +470,21 @@ gt mail send gastown/witness -s "Dependency resolved: <bd-xxx>" \\
 
 Keep notifications brief and actionable. The recipient can run bd show for details."""
 
+[[steps]]
+id = "heartbeat-mid"
+title = "Mid-cycle heartbeat refresh"
+needs = ["orphan-process-cleanup", "test-pollution-cleanup", "dispatch-gated-molecules", "fire-notifications"]
+description = """
+Refresh the heartbeat mid-cycle to prevent the daemon from killing us during long patrols.
+
+```bash
+gt deacon heartbeat "mid-cycle checkpoint"
+```"""
+
 [[steps]]
 id = "health-scan"
 title = "Check Witness and Refinery health"
-needs = ["orphan-process-cleanup", "test-pollution-cleanup", "dispatch-gated-molecules", "fire-notifications"]
+needs = ["heartbeat-mid"]
 description = """
 Check Witness and Refinery health for each rig.
 
@@ -654,9 +683,8 @@ gt dog add <name>
 **Step 3: Retire stale dogs (optional)**
 Dogs that have been idle for >24 hours can be removed to save resources:
 ```bash
-gt dog status <name>
-# Check last_active timestamp
-# If idle > 24h: gt dog remove <name>
+gt dogs list --json
+# Check last_active in each entry; if idle > 24h: gt dog remove <name>
 ```
 
 **Pool sizing guidelines:**
